meaning: vt.推动,推进,激励,驱使,逼迫
examples: There are various reasons that impel me to that conclusion.
These verbs mean to constrain or impel to action.
But all these can only take our power to impel us to go forward.
If anything, I believe that such restraint is likely to impel, rather than restrain, proliferation.
Our incisive questioning can challenge years of established thought and impel costly change.
